[[section-search]]
= Search & AI Embeddings

Capri DAM provides two complementary search modes:

* **Full-text search** — powered by PostgreSQL `tsvector` / `tsquery`.
* **Semantic search** — powered by **pgvector** with float embeddings generated by a configurable AI provider.

Both modes are exposed through the unified `GET /api/v1/search` endpoint and the
`search` GraphQL query.

== Full-text search

=== Indexed fields

A generated `tsvector` column combines `title`, `description`, `tags`, `custom_metadata` values,
and extracted `metadata` (EXIF/IPTC captions).

[source,sql]
----
-- Simplified representation of the search index
CREATE INDEX assets_search_idx ON assets USING gin(search_vector);
----

=== Query

[source,http]
----
GET /api/v1/search?q=product+launch&folder_id=5&content_type[]=image/jpeg
----

Rails generates:

[source,ruby]
----
Asset.where("search_vector @@ plainto_tsquery(:q)", q: "product launch")
     .where(folder_id: folder_subtree_ids)
     .where(content_type: ["image/jpeg"])
     .order("ts_rank(search_vector, plainto_tsquery(?)) DESC", "product launch")
----

=== Facets

`AssetFilterBar` (UI) and the API support multi-select filters on:
`content_type`, `tags`, `created_at` range, `status`, `folder_id`.

== Semantic search (pgvector)

=== Embedding generation

When an asset is processed, `ExtractionWorker` queues an embedding generation call:

[source,ruby]
----
# app/services (conceptual)
class EmbeddingService
  def generate(asset)
    text = [asset.title, asset.description, asset.metadata['caption']].compact.join(' ')
    vector = ai_client.embed(text)          # calls configured AI provider
    asset.create_asset_embedding!(vector:)  # stored as pgvector column
  end
end
----

The AI provider (OpenAI, Cohere, local Ollama, etc.) is configured in `AiConfiguration`.

=== Similarity search

[source,http]
----
POST /api/v1/search/similar
{ "asset_id": 42, "limit": 10 }
----

[source,ruby]
----
AssetEmbedding.nearest_neighbors(:vector, target.vector, distance: :cosine)
              .limit(10)
              .map(&:asset)
----

=== Semantic Collection Cluster Map

The `Collections/SemanticClusterMap.jsx` component renders an `@xyflow/react`
force-directed graph where nodes are assets and edge weights are cosine similarity
scores.  Clicking a cluster auto-selects assets for a new collection.

== Re-ranking

When `semantic: true` is passed to the search endpoint, the API:

. Runs the full-text query to get candidate IDs.
. Fetches their embeddings.
. Re-ranks results by cosine distance to the query embedding.
. Returns the merged, re-ranked list.

== AI Copilot

The AI Copilot feature (`POST /api/v1/copilots/chat`) provides a chat interface
for asset discovery:

[source,http]
----
POST /api/v1/copilots/chat
{ "message": "Show me all hero images approved last month" }
----

The copilot translates natural-language queries into filter predicates and returns
a structured result with a plain-text explanation.

Requires `AiConfiguration.active = true` and a valid API key.

== Configuration

[source,yaml]
----
# Managed via Admin → Intelligence or PUT /api/v1/ai_configurations/:id
provider: openai          # openai | cohere | ollama | azure_openai
model: text-embedding-3-small
api_key: <encrypted>
dimensions: 1536
batch_size: 50
----

Re-generate all embeddings:

[source,bash]
----
# Enqueue a full-library re-embedding run
bundle exec rails runner "Asset.find_each { |a| ExtractionWorker.perform_async(a.id) }"
----

Or use the Admin → Intelligence → "Re-embed All Assets" button.

== Data health

`GET /api/v1/data_health` reports:

[source,json]
----
{
  "assets_without_embeddings": 12,
  "quarantined_assets": 3,
  "orphaned_blobs": 0,
  "missing_thumbnails": 5
}
----
